field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': {'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release'}, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '支付申请', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'validation_status', 'name', 'type', 'payment_flow_label', 'business_category_id', 'date_request']}, {'title': '项目与合同', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'company_id', 'partner_id', 'contract_id', 'settlement_id', 'material_settlement_id']}, {'title': '申请金额', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['amount', 'amount_uppercase', 'request_amount_display', 'paid_amount_total', 'unpaid_amount', 'currency_id']}, {'title': '收付款账户', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['payer_unit', 'actual_payee_unit', 'payment_account_name', 'payment_bank_name', 'payment_account_no', 'partner_account_name', 'partner_bank_name', 'partner_bank_account']}, {'title': '结算匹配', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['settlement_compliance_state', 'settlement_compliance_message', 'settlement_amount_total', 'settlement_paid_amount', 'settlement_remaining_amount', 'settlement_amount_payable', 'related_document_text']}, {'title': '说明与附件', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['note', 'attachment_ids', 'payment_request_attachment_text_display']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_source_table', 'legacy_record_id', 'legacy_document_state', 'creator_name', 'created_time', 'source_created_by', 'source_created_at', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'state', 'sequence': 10, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'validation_status', 'sequence': 20, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'name', 'sequence': 30}, {'name': 'type', 'sequence': 40}, {'name': 'payment_flow_label', 'sequence': 50, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'business_category_id', 'sequence': 60}, {'name': 'sequence': 110}, {'name': 'settlement_id', 'sequence': 120}, {'name': 'material_settlement_id', 'sequence': 130}, {'name': 'amount', 'sequence': 140}, {'name': 'amount_uppercase', 'sequence': 150, 'related_document_text', 'sequence': 340, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'note', 'sequence': 350}, {'name': 'attachment_ids', 'sequence': 360}, {'name': 'payment_request_attachment_text_display', 'source_created_by', 'sequence': 430, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'source_created_at', 'sequence': 440, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'active', 'sequence': 450} ] } } } }
